body.title: CLOSED: Consolidate /savestate and /savestateauto skills
body.result: Consolidated: /savestateauto deleted, all steps absorbed into /savestate Step 2–5. Callers (ticket, sprint, sprint-batch, day-close, fixit) updated. /savestate is now the single skill.
body.description:
/savestate and /savestateauto are now redundant. Both handle slate flush + auto-compact via tmux send-keys two-step (verified 2026-05-03). The only difference was invocation pattern (manual vs auto-firing). Consolidate into a single /savestate skill that always outputs the preserve string and fires the auto-compact via tmux.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/.claude/skills/savestate, /home/akien/.claude/skills/savestateauto
**Design rules:** no rules apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: consolidate two skills into one. OUT: change auto-compact behavior or tmux wiring (both working). OUT: change workflow or create new skills.
**Test plan:** manual test: invoke consolidated skill, verify preserve string outputs AND auto-compact fires via tmux (check tmux status line or next turn shows compact ran)
